sglang.title: [bugfix] Fix sgl-router get_server_info endpoint compatibility issue
sglang.author: slin1237
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
The sgl-router's PD (Prefill-Decode) router was returning an incompatible response format for the /get_server_info endpoint, causing bench_one_batch_server.py to
fail with an UnboundLocalError when attempting to extract the tokenizer_path. The benchmark script expects the server info to c

sglang.title: Integrate triton moe kernel
sglang.author: yuan-luo
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This PR is to follow up #7287.
The main purpose is to replace fused_moe with Triton v3.4.0 matmul_ogs kernel, in order to improve fused_moe's performance.

sglang.title: Kernels for efficient KV cache IO
sglang.author: xiezhq-hermann
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
The primary limitation of the current HiCache implementation (introduced in PR #2693) lies in inefficient I/O between the CPU and GPU. This inefficiency stems from the fragmentation of KV caches in memory, which results in a large number of small I/O operations and consequently poor bandw

vllm.title: Implement OpenAI Responses API [1/N]
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR implements the basic support for the OpenAI Responses API.

 Basic stateless functionalities with stream=False
 Reasoning parser support
 Structured outputs on normal outputs (not on reasoning part)
 Stateful APIs (with just a python dictionary)

TODOs:

 Tool/functional calling support
 Out

vllm.author: dbyoung18
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds xccl support for XPU Platform since pytorch supports xccl as xpu distributed backend since 2.8 release:

Add dist_backend to CudaPlatformBase which can better abstract distributed backend and be reused during  init_distributed_environment()
Add supports_xccl() check under utils
